campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign harness on the fixed `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by enforcing downstream-only control-paired comparison first, then testing same-trace checkpoint/export selection, while carrying recurrence handoff and shared-trunk late branching as deferred next mechanisms once the harness exposes the needed primitives.
name: Shared-Trunk Late-Branch Portfolio
why_keep: It changes compute topology rather than a finisher knob and is the strongest honest branch/composition line once shared-trunk resume exists.
minimal_probe: After branch-resume support exists, fork 2 to 4 late finishers from one trunk checkpoint plus 2 single-path controls and compare marginal downstream gain per extra finisher budget.
expected_signal: At least one branch beats the single-path control on downstream `score_bpb` beyond control spread while using less total compute than training the same number of full independent runs.
pack_rationale: Keep deferred and only admit after solo families exist; this is a composition family, not a first-pack candidate.

source_candidate.worldview: Keep the published pr1394 SP8192/GPTQ-embeddings/depth-recurrence/MuonEq-R/SDClip stack frozen and treat this cycle as a harness-validity search over bounded comparison, selector, and transition programs. Favor families that change the unit of comparison or artifact/transition policy on the real base, and mark stateful controller or branching lines as blocked when the current target script and harness do not yet expose the needed primitives.
source_candidate.name: Shared-Trunk Late-Branch Portfolio
source_candidate.mechanism: Train a shared pr1394 trunk once, then fork a small portfolio of late finishers or export selectors near warmdown and pick the best downstream artifact from the branch set instead of committing to one endgame path for the whole run.
source_candidate.broken_invariant: One committed finisher is the right compute topology; late branching cannot produce better downstream artifacts per unit compute than independent single-path runs.
source_candidate.not_local_tuning_reason: This changes the topology of the run by reallocating compute from full independent candidates to a shared-trunk plus portfolio program, which is a composition-level search move rather than a parameter tweak.
source_candidate.measurement_plan: At least one late branch beats the single-path control on downstream `score_bpb` by more than control spread while consuming less total compute than training the same number of full independent candidates.
source_candidate.smallest_decisive_probe: Run 2 controls and up to 4 branches off the same trunk checkpoint, where each branch differs only in finisher/export policy. Compare marginal downstream gain per additional finisher budget against a single-path control.
source_candidate.expected_observable: At least one late branch beats the single-path control on downstream `score_bpb` by more than control spread while consuming less total compute than training the same number of full independent candidates.
source_candidate.falsifier: If branch winners never clear control spread, or branch-specific variance dominates any apparent gain, the portfolio story is false on this base.
source_candidate.novelty_vs_history: Distinct from both selector-only and handoff-only families because the searchable object is a branch portfolio over a shared trunk. It maps directly to the repo's recurring late-branch abstraction instead of another static slate.
source_candidate.self_check_summary: This is consequential because it changes compute topology and artifact selection together. The probe is still compact, but the current harness likely lacks shared-trunk branch orchestration, so the blocked classification is required.

reasons: This is a real composition-level move that changes compute topology, not just a finisher tweak.
It is distinct from selector-only families because it reallocates training budget into a shared-trunk portfolio.
The blocked status is honest and the decisive probe is still interpretable once branch-resume machinery exists.
